preamble: Fortition (strengthening) and velarization of labio-velar approximant [w] to velar fricative [ɣ], common in several Germanic or Gallo-Romance historical developments.

languageExamples.note: Development of velar fricatives from labio-velar approximants.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
